from app.database import engine
from sqlalchemy import inspect
inspector = inspect\(engine\)
tables = inspector.get_table_names\(\)
print\('Tables:', tables\)
for t in tables:
    cols = inspector.get_columns\(t\)
    print\(f'\\n{t}:'\)
    for c in cols:
        print\(f'  {c[\\"name\\"]} - {c[\\"type\\"]}'\)
")

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
from app.database import SessionLocal
from app.models import Conversation

db = SessionLocal\(\)
convs = db.query\(Conversation\).all\(\)
for c in convs:
    if c.title == 'Yeni söhbət' and c.messages:
        first_msg = [m for m in c.messages if m.role == 'user']
        if first_msg:
            c.title = first_msg[0].content[:40]
            print\(f'Updated: {c.id} -> {c.title}'\)
db.commit\(\)
db.close\(\)
")

Bash(cd C:/Users/user/Documents/Projects/lex-assist/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

import fitz
import os

pdf_dir = './data/pdfs'
for f in os.listdir\(pdf_dir\):
    if f.endswith\('.pdf'\):
        path = os.path.join\(pdf_dir, f\)
        doc = fitz.open\(path\)
        total_text = ''
        for page in doc:
            total_text += page.get_text\(\)
        doc.close\(\)
        print\(f'{f}: {len\(total_text\)} chars, {len\(total_text.split\(\)\)} words'\)
        if len\(total_text\) < 200:
            print\(f'  Text preview: {repr\(total_text[:200]\)}'\)
        else:
            print\(f'  First 200 chars: {total_text[:200]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/user/Documents/Projects/lex-assist/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('./data/pdfs/1fes.pdf'\)
print\(f'Pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)
total = ''
for i, page in enumerate\(doc\):
    t = page.get_text\(\)
    total += t
    if i < 3:
        print\(f'Page {i}: {len\(t\)} chars'\)
        print\(f'  Preview: {repr\(t[:150]\)}'\)
doc.close\(\)
print\(f'Total text: {len\(total\)} chars'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/user/Documents/Projects/lex-assist/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('./data/pdfs/1fes.pdf'\)
print\(f'Pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)
total = ''
for i, page in enumerate\(doc\):
    t = page.get_text\(\)
    total += t
    if i < 3:
        print\(f'Page {i}: {len\(t\)} chars'\)
        if t.strip\(\):
            print\(f'  Preview: {t[:150]}'\)
        else:
            print\(f'  \(empty - likely scanned/image PDF\)'\)
doc.close\(\)
print\(f'Total chars: {len\(total\)}'\)
print\(f'Total words: {len\(total.split\(\)\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/user/Documents/Projects/lex-assist/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, io, time
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)

from app.rag import extract_text_from_pdf, chunk_text

text = extract_text_from_pdf\('./data/pdfs/1fes.pdf'\)
print\(f'Extracted: {len\(text\)} chars'\)

chunks = chunk_text\(text\)
print\(f'Chunks: {len\(chunks\)}'\)
print\(f'Avg chunk size: {sum\(len\(c\) for c in chunks\) // len\(chunks\)} chars'\)
print\(f'First chunk preview: {chunks[0][:100]}...'\)
print\(f'Last chunk preview: {chunks[-1][:100]}...'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/user/Documents/Projects/lex-assist/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, io, time
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
from app.rag import extract_text_from_pdf, chunk_text, embedding_model
text = extract_text_from_pdf\('./data/pdfs/1fes.pdf'\)
chunks = chunk_text\(text\)
print\(f'{len\(chunks\)} chunks to embed'\)
start = time.time\(\)
embeddings = embedding_model.encode\(chunks, show_progress_bar=True\)
elapsed = time.time\(\) - start
print\(f'Embedding took: {elapsed:.1f} seconds'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/user/Documents/Projects/lex-assist/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import chromadb
from app.config import settings
client = chromadb.PersistentClient\(path=settings.chroma_path\)
col = client.get_or_create_collection\('legal_docs'\)
print\(f'Total chunks: {col.count\(\)}'\)
data = col.get\(include=['metadatas']\)
sources = {}
for m in data['metadatas']:
    s = m.get\('source','?'\)
    sources[s] = sources.get\(s, 0\) + 1
for s, c in sources.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {s}: {c} chunks'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v -E 'Warning|Loading|LOAD|Key|---|----|UNEXPECTED|Notes')
